formHeader: Free Case Evaluation. No Fee Unless We Win.
formPrivacy: Your information stays private. We never sell or share your details with anyone.
thankYouMessage: Thank you, {firstName}. A member of our team will call you within the hour to talk through what happened and what happens next.
blogIntro: Plain answers to the questions people ask us most after an accident, written so you can read them between phone calls.
heroTrustClaims: No win, no fee. You pay nothing unless we recover for you.
You work directly with your attorney, not a call center.
We litigate. We do not settle fast just to close the file.
riskReversalLine: There is no fee, no pressure, and no obligation. If we cannot help, we will tell you and point you to someone who can.
heroH1Format: [City]'s [Practice Area] Lawyers. No Win, No Fee. Guaranteed.
reviewsHeaderFormat: {N} {platform} reviews from people we have helped get back on their feet

founderSupportingCards.title: Direct access
founderSupportingCards.body_template: When you call, you reach the person handling your case, not a rotating intake line.

founderSupportingCards.title: We litigate
founderSupportingCards.body_template: We prepare every case as if it is going to trial, so the insurance company knows we are not bluffing.

founderSupportingCards.title: Local roots
founderSupportingCards.body_template: {founderFirstName} grew up in {primaryCity} and represents neighbors, not case numbers.
